using Microsoft.Extensions.Options;
using WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.Services.Models;

private static IOptions<DiaExceptionNotificationOptions> CreateNotificationOptions()
{
    return Options.Create(new DiaExceptionNotificationOptions
    {
        SenderConfigKey = "DIAErrorEmailSender",
        RecipientConfigKey = "DIAErrorEmailRecipients",
        ErrorLogType = "428910002",
        ProcessName = "DIA Ingestion"
    });
}

var service = new DiaExceptionNotificationService(
    loggerMock.Object,
    dataverseRepoMock.Object,
    CreateNotificationOptions());
